headline: Support surfaces now stay calmer on main pages by revealing note actions later and hiding them when footer support is already in view.
notes: Keeps the floating Send note action out of the first fold, then reveals it only after a meaningful scroll so the opening screens stay quieter.
Auto-hides the floating note action whenever the footer support rail is visible or expanded, avoiding duplicate support prompts in the same viewport.
Adds softer support-rail contrast plus click-outside and Escape-to-close behavior so the public-facing support layer feels lighter and more product-like.
